textByHash.423ec119ffd83028fc53fc0cd0c7503477f6a9a3: Will you be entering the Theatre? It will be fun to watch you die.
textByHash.adc25b01009c7706a7472c339174d96c02761bb5: I do enjoy a day out at the Theatre.
textByHash.c5cce053277fb0388fb5778e98364d46eb55a2d2: Come to see this show? I bet it's going to be a good one.
